allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f''''{len\(d\)} drivers: {[x[""name""] for x in d]}''''\)" curl -s http://localhost:3001/api/deliveries)
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f''''{len\(d\)} deliveries''''\)" curl -s http://localhost:3001/api/analytics)
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f''''avgStop={d[""avgStopTime""]} avgSpeed={d[""avgSpeed""]} onTime={d[""onTimeRate""]}%''''\)")
